evals.description: Trigger: skill activates on P99 latency investigation request
evals.prompt: Our API's P99 latency jumped from 80ms to 600ms after the last deploy. How do I diagnose this?

evals.description: Trigger: skill activates on memory leak investigation
evals.prompt: My Node.js service memory grows from 200MB to 2GB over 24 hours then crashes. How do I find the leak?

evals.description: Core task: generate correct Node.js CPU profiling command with 0x
evals.prompt: Show me how to generate a flame graph for my Node.js server using 0x.

evals.description: Core task: correct DataLoader pattern for N+1 fix
evals.prompt: I have a GraphQL resolver that calls db.findUser(id) for every post in a list. This causes N+1 queries. Fix it with DataLoader.

evals.description: Core task: move CPU work to worker thread
evals.prompt: I have a synchronous image processing function that takes 2 seconds. It's blocking my Express server. How do I fix it?

evals.description: Core task: correct microbenchmark setup with warmup
evals.prompt: How do I benchmark two sorting implementations fairly in Node.js?

evals.description: Core task: tree shaking lodash import correction
evals.prompt: My bundle is 500KB. I see lodash takes up 70KB. How do I reduce that?

evals.description: Gotcha: averages vs percentiles - must recommend percentiles
evals.prompt: Our average API response time is 45ms, which seems fine. Why are users complaining about slowness?

evals.description: Gotcha: WeakRef for cache to avoid memory leak
evals.prompt: My in-memory cache keeps growing. I want cached values to be garbage collected when memory is needed. How?

evals.description: Gotcha: connection pool release in finally block
evals.prompt: I'm seeing 'connection timeout' errors under load with pg Pool. What am I likely doing wrong?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: must not invent non-existent Node.js profiling flags
evals.prompt: What Node.js flags can I use for CPU profiling?

evals.description: References load: profiling-tools reference file should be cited for tool selection questions
evals.prompt: I need to profile a Node.js service. Should I use clinic.js, 0x, or Chrome DevTools? What are the trade-offs?
